emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the The West Coast Hotel website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 74/100
========================================

5 issues identified:

HIGH
--------------------
- 3 HTTPS issues
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No structured data
 HIGH
--------------------
- 1 broken image
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No blog/updates section
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- Slow Google Fonts load


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios
